title: podman-remote make --size optional in ps
body:
Close #3578 Add `size` field to PsOpts in podman remote to calculate container size when necessary.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

Does @giuseppe 's hold have to be canceled for this to go through?

Yeah. We use the hold to make sure it doesn't land before tests go green.
/hold cancel
